Sounds wonderful ! Have a good time! I've  been to many countries on vacation. I'd always thought that many other countries were better than Hong Kong but after I vacationed in these countries, I realized that in terms of city life, nightlife, food and shopping, Hong Kong really was the best. In Europe, shops close at four o'clock on weekdays and don't open on the weekends except for big cities like London in which shops close at six o'clock on weekdays and four on weekends. Their main sorts of entertainment are pubs and clubs. Las Vegas has magificent night views but it was primarily built for tourism. It's famous for gambling, unique hotel design and shows like boxing events. However, in terms of scenery, Scandinavia and Tibet are the most ravishing I would say. Tibet is famous for its breathtaking scenery at high altitude. Xinjiang is also a place of outstanding scenic beauty. If you think you might have altitude sickness, such as dizziness, headaches or trouble sleeping, I suggest that you should bring some medicine along. Besides, my friend who's been to the Mount Everest base camp showed me her photos taken there by which I was awestruck. It's certainly a glamorous vacation spot. A tour of the Mount Everest base camp would be a once in a lifetime experience. Tibet is also the best place for stargazing since it's much closer to the heavens than any other places on earth and the sky at night is often clear and cloudless. It has some of the highest lakes in the world which are rich with fish and other marine life and the countryside is inhabited by flocks of yellow ducks and wild horses as well as donkeys. The lakes on Tibet such as Lake Paiku which is four thousand five hundred and ninety two meters above sea level, reflect the beauty of the stars, giving a double view of the sky at night. You can even set up a tent and camp there to get the bedt view of the stars and the Milky Way Galaxy.

I'd always thought that many other countries were better than Hong Kong but after I vacationed in these countries, I realized that in terms of city life, nightlife, food and shopping, Hong Kong really was the best. In Europe, shops close at four o'clock on weekdays and don't open on the weekends except for big cities like London in which shops close at six o'clock on weekdays and four on weekends. Their main sorts of entertainment are pubs and clubs. Las Vegas has magificent night views but it was primarily built for tourism. It's famous for gambling, unique hotel design and shows like boxing events. However, in terms of scenery, Scandinavia and Tibet are the most ravishing I would say. Tibet is famous for its breathtaking scenery at high altitude. Xinjiang is also a place of outstanding scenic beauty. If you think you might have altitude sickness, such as dizziness, headaches or trouble sleeping, I suggest that you should bring some medicine along. Besides, my friend who's been to the Mount Everest base camp showed me her photos taken there by which I was awestruck. It's certainly a glamorous vacation spot. A tour of the Mount Everest base camp would be a once in a lifetime experience. Tibet is also the best place for stargazing since it's much closer to the heavens than any other places on earth and the sky at night is often clear and cloudless. It has some of the highest lakes in the world which are rich with fish and other marine life and the countryside is inhabited by flocks of yellow ducks and wild horses as well as donkeys. The lakes on Tibet such as Lake Paiku which is four thousand five hundred and ninety two meters above sea level, reflect the beauty of the stars, giving a double view of the sky at night. quote.msg: Sounds wonderful ! Have a good time! I've  been to many countries on vacation. I'd always thought that many other countries were better than Hong Kong but after I vacationed in these countries, I realized that in terms of city life, nightlife, food and shopping, Hong Kong really was the best. In Europe, shops close at four o'clock on weekdays and don't open on the weekends except for big cities like London in which shops close at six o'clock on weekdays and four on weekends. Their main sorts of entertainment are pubs and clubs. Las Vegas has magificent night views but it was primarily built for tourism. It's famous for gambling, unique hotel design and shows like boxing events. However, in terms of scenery, Scandinavia and Tibet are the most ravishing I would say. Tibet is famous for its breathtaking scenery at high altitude. Xinjiang is also a place of outstanding scenic beauty. If you think you might have altitude sickness, such as dizziness, headaches or trouble sleeping, I suggest that you should bring some medicine along. Besides, my friend who's been to the Mount Everest base camp showed me her photos taken there by which I was awestruck. It's certainly a glamorous vacation spot. A tour of the Mount Everest base camp would be a once in a lifetime experience. Tibet is also the best place for stargazing since it's much closer to the heavens than any other places on earth and the sky at night is often clear and cloudless. It has some of the highest lakes in the world which are rich with fish and other marine life and the countryside is inhabited by flocks of yellow ducks and wild horses as well as donkeys. The lakes on Tibet such as Lake Paiku which is four thousand five hundred and ninety two meters above sea level, reflect the beauty of the stars, giving a double view of the sky at night. You can even set up a tent and camp there to get the bedt view of the stars and the Milky Way Galaxy.
Thank you for your comment. I enjoyed it a lot. Hong Kong is very good in certain aspects indeed.

replies.msg: 連登應該得你認真覆佢

pinned.msg:
詳細行程

(括號內數字表示11個島嘅遊覽次序，隻腳落地先算到左)：

0430 - 0510 N29 黃大仙 至 機場
0510 - 0530 （1）赤鱲角逗留20分鐘
0530 - 0555 DB02R 機場 至 愉景灣
0555 - 0645 （2）大嶼山 (愉景灣）逗留50分鐘
0645 - 0654 船 愉景灣 至 坪洲
0654 - 0730 （3）坪洲逗留36分鐘
0730 - 0842 船 坪洲 至 長洲 （經梅窩，芝麻灣）
0842 - 0900 （4）長洲逗留18分鐘
0900 - 0939 船 長洲 至 中環
0939 - 0950 （5a）香港島（中環）逗留11分鐘
0950 - 1013 九巴603 中環 至 油塘邨
1013 - 1023 行路 油塘邨 至 三家村
1030 - 1117 船 三家村 至 東龍洲
1117 - 1225 （6）東龍洲逗留68分鐘
1225 - 1307 船 東龍洲 至 三家村
1330 - 1342 船 三家村 至 西灣河
1348 - 1426 新巴14 西灣河 至 赤柱
1426 - 1530 （5b）香港島（赤柱）逗留64分鐘
1530 - 1602 船 赤柱 至 蒲台島
1602 - 1800 （7）蒲台島逗留118分鐘
1800 - 1855 船 蒲台島 至 香港仔 （經赤柱）
1858 - 1902 船 香港仔珍寶碼頭 至 鴨脷洲
1902 - 1908 （8）鴨脷洲逗留6分鐘
1908 - 1912 船 鴨脷洲 至 香港仔行人隧道口
1915 - 1952 船 香港仔 至 榕樹灣 （經北角村）
1952 - 2030 （9）南丫島逗留38分鐘
2030 - 2057 船 榕樹灣 至 中環
2057 - 2130 （5c）香港島（中環）逗留33分鐘
2130 - 2155 船 中環 至 柏麗灣
2155 - 2226 （10）馬灣逗留31 分鐘
2226 - 2236 NR330 柏麗灣 至 青衣
2236 - 2315 （11）青衣逗留39分鐘
2315 - 2342 九巴42C 青衣 至 黃大仙

全程行左28公里
